flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mission College rose 46% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.6k → $12.5k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Mission College rose 27% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mission College fell 12% between 2007 and 2010 (23.6% → 20.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mission College rose 11% between 2007 and 2010 ($614 → $682).
